executive_summary_zh: 今天候选内容整体偏弱，只有一条来自 GitHub 官方变更日志、且与企业级 AI 编码代理治理和 IDE/CLI 工作流有直接关系的更新值得关注。
最高信号点不是“Claude 接入 JetBrains”本身，而是 GitHub 开始把组织级/企业级 agent 分发、CLI 会话 steering、agent 调试日志摘要、以及 cloud agent GA 组合成一套可治理的代理工作流。
对后端/平台/工程效率负责人而言，这说明 AI coding 正从个人助手功能，转向受控的团队级 agent 配置、可观测性与成本可见性。
executive_summary_en: Today is a weak signal day overall; only one official GitHub changelog item is strong enough to keep.

The real signal is not merely 'Claude in JetBrains' but GitHub packaging org/enterprise agent distribution, CLI session steering, agent debug-log summaries, and cloud-agent GA into a more governable agent workflow.
For backend/platform/engineering leaders, this suggests AI coding is moving from individual-assistant features toward managed team-level agents with observability and cost visibility.

items.title: New features and Claude as agent provider preview in JetBrains IDEs
items.author: Allison
items.summary_zh: GitHub 在 JetBrains IDE 中更新了 Copilot agent 能力：支持直接使用组织级和企业级自定义 agents，Copilot CLI 会话可排队与 steering，新增 agent debug logs 摘要视图，并将 Claude 作为 agent provider 引入公开预览；同时 cloud agent 进入 GA，并增加每轮 AI credits 指示与 model picker 改进。
items.summary_en: GitHub updated Copilot agent capabilities in JetBrains IDEs: org- and enterprise-level custom agents are now usable directly in the IDE, Copilot CLI sessions support message queueing and steering, a new agent debug-log summary view was added, Claude is now in public preview as an agent provider, and cloud agent is generally available alongside per-turn AI credit indicators and model-picker improvements.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 这条更新的核心价值在于“企业可治理的 agent 分发与运行面板”开始成型。对工程平台团队来说，组织管理员可发布标准化 agents，开发者在 IDE 内直接消费，意味着 prompt/工具链/工作流可以从个人配置转为团队资产；而 CLI steering、debug logs 摘要和 credits 可见性，则补上了人机协作、故障排查与成本治理三个关键环节。
items.why_it_matters_en: The main value is that a governable enterprise agent distribution and runtime surface is taking shape. For platform teams, admins can publish standardized agents that developers consume directly in the IDE, turning prompts/toolchains/workflows from personal setup into team assets. CLI steering, debug-log summaries, and credit visibility add the missing layers for human-in-the-loop control, troubleshooting, and cost governance.
key_takeaways_zh: 组织级/企业级 agents 直接进入 JetBrains，说明 agent 正在被当作可集中发布和治理的开发平台构件，而不只是个人聊天配置。
CLI steering、debug logs 摘要、per-turn credits 指示一起出现，表明 agent 产品正在补足可控性、可观测性和 FinOps 能力。
key_takeaways_en: Org/enterprise agents landing directly in JetBrains shows agents are becoming centrally published and governed platform artifacts, not just personal chat presets.
CLI steering, debug-log summaries, and per-turn credit indicators together signal that agent products are maturing on controllability, observability, and FinOps.

top_items: New features and Claude as agent provider preview in JetBrains IDEs
new_terms_zh: 组织级/企业级 agents：由 GitHub 组织或企业管理员统一发布、供成员直接使用的自定义代理。
CLI steering：在命令行 agent 会话执行过程中，对消息流和执行方向进行排队、引导或调整的控制能力。
agent debug logs 摘要视图：将代理运行日志压缩成可读摘要，用于快速诊断工具调用与执行问题。
per-turn AI credits indicator：在每轮交互级别展示 AI 配额/信用消耗的可见性机制。
new_terms_en: Org/enterprise agents: custom agents published centrally by GitHub organization or enterprise admins for members to use directly.
CLI steering: the ability to queue, guide, or adjust message flow and execution direction during command-line agent sessions.
Agent debug-log summary view: a compressed, readable summary of agent runtime logs for faster diagnosis of tool calls and execution issues.
Per-turn AI credits indicator: visibility into AI credit consumption at the level of each interaction turn.
themes_zh: AI 编码代理从个人助手走向团队级可治理资产。
开发者工具开始把控制、调试、成本可见性作为 agent 体验的第一等能力。
IDE 与 CLI 的 agent 工作流正在融合。
themes_en: AI coding agents are moving from personal assistants to governable team-level assets.
Developer tooling is elevating control, debugging, and cost visibility into first-class agent capabilities.
Agent workflows across IDE and CLI are converging.
implications_zh: 平台团队应开始评估是否把内部编码规范、常见修复流程和 repo 操作封装成可集中发布的 agents，而不是依赖个人 prompt 习惯。
若团队已试点 CLI agent，需要同步建设日志留存、运行审计和成本归因，否则规模化后会出现调试与治理盲区。
采购或标准化 IDE/agent 工具时，应把多模型接入放在次要位置，把 agent 分发、权限边界、日志与成本指标放在优先位置。
implications_en: Platform teams should evaluate packaging internal coding standards, common remediation flows, and repo operations as centrally published agents rather than relying on personal prompt habits.
If CLI agents are already being piloted, teams should add log retention, execution auditability, and cost attribution now, or scaling will create debugging and governance blind spots.
When standardizing IDE/agent tooling, treat multi-model access as secondary and prioritize agent distribution, permission boundaries, logs, and cost metrics.
reading_order: New features and Claude as agent provider preview in JetBrains IDEs
what_to_ignore_zh: 其余候选基本都是 GitHub changelog 首页、月归档或 feed 聚合页，属于同一条内容的重复入口，没有新增技术信息。
不要把这条更新误读为单纯模型接入新闻；真正值得看的是企业级 agent 分发、调试与治理能力。
what_to_ignore_en: The remaining candidates are essentially the GitHub changelog index, archive, or feed pages and add no new technical information beyond the same item.
Do not over-index on the model-provider angle alone; the stronger signal is enterprise agent distribution, debugging, and governance.
